law coherence is two-sided and only full when both sides close — `isFullyCoherent` holds iff edge-reciprocity is 1 (every binding in phase) AND coherentFraction is 1 (no orphan has decohered); edge-coherence alone can be perfect while a leaked node still holds tamper-cost below ∞, so the in-phase field equals the whole aura only when no link and no node leaks.
